summary: Review round 1 fix pass (round 2): REV-001 rewrote docs/index.md:83 to the new /gogo:done semantics (synthesizes a high-level entry into .gogo/changelog/<date>-<name>/, written not copied, single-or-merged; swept the page); REV-002 added members? to the charts-manifest field list in templates/contracts/README.md; REV-003 made gogo-done step 4 manifest.json diagrams schema-complete ({kind,file,title}, must validate against charts-manifest.schema.json); REV-004 wording-only <date>-<slug>→<date>-<name> in gogo-view labels/arg-grammar, commands/view.md:11, gogo-status changelog_path. All four review findings marked fixed in review/issues.json. Docs/skills only — no product code path changed.
